title: AI startup CEO Dan Shipper spent $13,000 on OpenAI Codex in a month, and isn't worried
snippet: Every CEO Dan Shipper says AI is becoming as essential to modern workplaces as laptops and employee benefits, even as usage costs climb sharply.

title: Nvidia launches RTX Spark chip to power Windows PCs with 128GB memory and AI agents
snippet: Nvidia's new RTX Spark chip will enable Windows laptops to run AI agents locally, allowing users to automate tasks and use natural language. The chip features a 20-core Grace CPU and Blackwell RTX GPU, offering up to 1 petaflop of AI performance and 128GB of memory.

title: Urban Indian youth consumes 120  minutes daily of social media; Female users dominate e-commerce attention: Report
snippet: Social Media usage among the young, mass-market urban India demographic aged 18-24 years averages more than 120 minutes per day, significantly outpacing the overall category average of 97.9 minutes per day.

title: Apple smart glasses set to arrive in 2027 as company plans to disrupt $200 billion eyewear market: Report
snippet: Apple is set to launch smart glasses by early 2027. The company is reportedly looking to replicate the success of the Apple Watch by competing against the eyewear giants instead of just Meta and Samsung.
